_doc: Project invariants enforced by .claude/hooks/invariant_guard.py (PreToolUse). Add an entry when the user gives a durable rule that future edits must respect (e.g. 'list views must always sort by type'). The hook reads this file on every Edit/Write/MultiEdit and BLOCKS the tool call if a `blocker` severity invariant is being violated.

_schema.applies_to: list of glob patterns (workspace-relative). Empty = applies everywhere.

rules.must_keep_regex: list of regex patterns; if old_string matched, new_string must too
rules.must_keep_call: list of bare function/attribute names; matches `name(` and `.name(`

_schema.severity: blocker (deny edit) or warn (allow + inject reminder)
_schema.rationale: why this rule exists — surface in the block message

_workflow: 1. User states a durable rule: 'sort theo type cố định'.
2. Run /adr-add to capture the WHY in decision-log.md.
3. Run /inv-add to translate the rule into must_keep_regex / must_keep_call patterns.
5. The hook now BLOCKS any edit that strips the pattern.
